events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: commercial project, post-tensioning, observed field condition: elongation record vs. calculated mismatch (DOC). Work through testing/inspection. Reference PTI. Need compare field condition against referenced document. Decision likely fail because mismatch between recorded elongation and calculated elongation indicates non-compliance/defective. Need risk high/critical? Post-tensioning elongation mismatch can indicate under/over stressing, structural integrity. Since inspected and mismatch, fail. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 90? value? Could use mismatch value? Not numeric reading provided. Could set 0. Need references PTI. Need findings: recorded elongation does not match calculated elongation per PTI requirements. Actions: investigate cause, recalibrate/re-stress, consult engineer/PTI specialist, document corrections, re-inspect. Rationale. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside JSON.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "tested/inspected",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 90,
  "value": 0,

  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,

  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Elongation record does not match the calculated elongation for the post-tensioning tendons.",
    "Mismatch indicates potential under-stressing, over-stressing, or incorrect friction/loss assumptions.",
    "Installation does not meet PTI acceptance criteria for stressing records."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop acceptance of the post-tensioning work until the mismatch is resolved.",
    "Have the PT engineer review the elongation calculations, jack calibration, and field records.",
    "Re-stress or adjust tendons as required by the engineer and PTI guidelines.",
    "Recalibrate stressing equipment and verify wobble/friction coefficients.",
    "Submit corrected records and obtain re-inspection before proceeding."
  ],
  "rationale": "PTI requires that recorded tendon elongations agree with calculated values within specified tolerances. A documented mismatch at the inspection stage means the work is non-compliant and potentially structurally deficient, so it must fail until corrected and verified.",
  "references": ["PTI Guide Specification for Post-Tensioning Materials", "PTI Field Procedures Manual for Unbonded Single-Strand Tendons", "ACI 318 - Post-Tensioning Acceptance Criteria"]
}
